programme.title: Nishabd
programme.desc: A 60-year-old man falls in love with his daughter's 18-year-old friend, leading to emotional conflict.

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: Undercover agent Wali Khan and his team target D-Company's leader, Goldman. Facing betrayals and danger, they stage a bold escape into India, reshaping the underworld's power dynamics.

programme.title: Rudratandava
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: GANESH
programme.desc: In order to help a friend, Ganesh pretends to love a girl. She hates him when she finds out the truth. Eventually, he truly falls in love with her and must convince her of his true feelings.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Aage Ki Soch
programme.desc: Ganpat, a simple villager, falls for Sapna, a visitor. When she returns married, he quietly bears his heartbreak while serving her family.

programme.title: Apne Apne
programme.desc: Ravi chooses duty over love, marrying for wealth. Years later, his troubled son finds refuge at Sharda's ashram.

programme.title: Pyar Pyar
programme.desc: Rajkumar, an honest income tax officer, gets a shock when he learns that his son loves his enemy's daughter.

programme.title: Dil Diwana
programme.desc: Dil Diwana, an Odia dubbed romantic comedy: A local guy is challenged to win a cop's daughter's heart against all odds.

programme.title: Mere Jeevan Sathi
programme.desc: Back in college, Natasha (Karisma Kapoor) was obsessed with Vicky (Akshay Kumar), who has become a successful rock star. Nothing ever happened between them, however. At the time, Vicky was in love with Anjali (Amisha Patel), who one fateful night suffered a great loss because of him. Now Natasha is the owner of a music label and has the power to make Vicky a global phenomenon. While Vicky, who is still with Anjali, wants to keep things professional, Natasha isn't about to take no for an answer.

programme.title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
programme.desc: A porn actor uses his fellow adult movie stars in creating a fake traditional family, in order to impress his girlfriend's conservative father.

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: In the romantic comedy film "Partner", we meet Prem, a self-proclaimed love guru who assists people in finding their soulmates. Despite his expertise, Prem's own love life is in disarray until he befriends Bhaskar, a carefree and fun-loving man. The two become business partners and friends, and Prem coaches Bhaskar on the intricacies of romance to help him win over Naina. However, their journey is filled with hilarious hurdles and misunderstandings that test their friendship and love lives.

programme.title: Shamitabh
programme.desc: An aspiring actor with the inability to speak, joins forces with a man who has a powerful voice. Together they take the film industry by storm, but will their egos get in the way?

programme.title: Khel Khilari Ka
programme.desc: Ajit vows revenge after witnessing his family's murder by three thugs.

programme.title: Ghatak / Lethal
programme.desc: When Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise a colony in Mumbai, he decides to strike back.

programme.title: Teri Meherbaniyan
programme.desc: A young man incurs the wrath of a corrupt leader when he helps the people of his village.

programme.title: ISM Tabaahi Zulm Ki
programme.desc: ISM Tabaahi Zulm Ki (2016) crime thriller: A gangster's daughter loves a journalist fighting crime and corruption.

programme.title: Narad Vijay
programme.desc: Lord Narayana sends Narada to Earth to test a devotee's will, sparking clashes among the faithful.

programme.title: Tholi Prema
programme.desc: Tholi Prema (2018) Hindi dubbed romance: Aditya and Varsha's love faces destiny's test as fate reunites them years later.

programme.title: Jwalamukhi
programme.desc: Jeeva wants revenge for his grandmother's death. What happens when he falls for the enemy's daughter?

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Lousy neighbour
programme.desc: You're young, you're attractive, and you want to make something of yourself. In order to achieve success, you move to the big city with a heart full of certainty that luck is always on your side. But how to not lose yourself in the vast sea of countless opportunities? How to know what's really important for you and what is nonessential? Kate is a 23-year-old makeup artist from a small provincial town, and she's absolutely certain that she's got what it takes! She can do it - period! She's joyfully advancing towards her dream with a smile on her face, happy to help anyone in need of her positive attitude along the way. Not even sudden unexpected hardships and difficulties can get her down. But fate seems to be constantly testing her optimism. Will she make it through and come out a winner after all?

programme.title: Curse Of The Nun
programme.desc: A damaged young woman is looking forward to moving to a beautiful new home, but the spirit of a deranged nun wants her to stay right where she is

The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.590
programme.desc: JANG WOO HYUK, LIGHTSUM, EPEX, JINI, BOGGIE, XG, tripleS EVOLution, KINGDOM, Park Ki Young, ILY:1, JUST B, Song Min Kyung, YOUNG POSSE, Roa

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is electronic musician and producer YESEO! This artist burst into the music scene in 2016 with her first single Let It All Go. Two years later in 2018 she was nominated for Best Rookie Best Dance & Electronic Album Best Dance & Electronic Song at the 15th Korean Music Awards with her first EP Million Things. This talented musician mesmerized not only domestic listeners but those outside Korea. The UK's Noisey highlighted YESEO as one of the most ambitious young guns in Seoul and she even opened for Cherokee and Honne during their concerts in Seoul. In this episode YESEO performs Privacy HOT HAND Cigarette Light as well as Youthful Kids and Free Up from her latest EP TRY TREE! Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter YEGNY formerly known as Choi Ye-geun! This artist first became known in 2012 as the genius keyboardist in an audition program titled K-pop Star - Season 2. Since then she has actively pursued her career as a musician releasing a number of singles and working with other top-notch musicians including AKMU. Last year YEGNY released her first full-length album Even If Get Lost It Can Flow Anyway and shared with the public her concerns as a musician and self-reflection as well as her view on human relationships and social issues. With the song Better Rush (feat. Huckleberry P) she changed her stage name to YEGNY to mark a new beginning as an artist. In this episode YEGNY performs Better Rush I know Lucid dream and Unbalance as well as her cover of Better by BoA and Irony by Wonder Girls. Tune in to I'm LIVE and check out all that YEGNY has to show off!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter ARO! ARO burst into the music scene in July 2018 with the single A Good Daughter. Her stage name means engraving in Korean which conveys her hope to engrave her name in the minds of the public. She's also known for her ability to express common relatable issues in her own unique way deeply touching and soothing listeners' hearts. Sentimental at times yet unpredictable at others she's definitely engraving her name in our hearts. In this episode ARO performs SEESAW When The Night Comes Day 1 Why Did You Answer? and also her cover of Delispice's Confession. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua

programme.desc: Khatra Khatra Khatra is a comedy-reality show featuring Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Punit Pathak, and others from Khatron Ke Khiladi. The show focuses on performing funny, embarrassing dares and playing pranks on each other, with losers facing humiliating punishments.

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Unlock My Boss
programme.desc: As Founder And Ceo Of One Of The Country'S Largest It Companies, Kim Sun Joo Is A Name Everyone Knows. A True Genius In His Field, Sun Joo Has Everything In Life Going For Him.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shock waves of fear through their normally quiet community clues are scarce until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A 911 dispatcher is found slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked sedan with a bullet through his torso to catch the killer, Rod Demery must retrace the victim's steps and untangle a web of accusation and innuendo spun by a shady cast of characters.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A family man is gunned down while doing a favor for a friend as Rod Demery searches for answers, he's confronted with a name from his past and an all too familiar tragedy when more blood is spilled, Demery is pushed to his breaking point.

programme.title: Redrum: Triangle of Death
programme.desc: A divorced factory worker is found in his home stabbed to death after a violent struggle.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A mother of three is shot point-blank with a high-caliber rifle just steps from her front door to catch a two-faced killer with a history of violence, Rod Demery must first win the trust of a family wary of the system.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: The lifeless body of an elderly veteran is found prone on the floor in his home all signs point to death by natural causes until Rod Demery finds a series of clues hidden in plain sight and uncovers a motive so cruel it shocks him to his core.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A mysterious accident on Christmas Eve leaves Tony Holden with a fatal neck injury, but the case goes unsolved when Rod Demery reopens the investigation, he discovers a conspiracy between unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: KakunuriEpi2BhaktiOne
programme.desc: Dharma Sandehalu preaches rational thinking and moral awareness by questioning traditional notions of dharma. Kakunuri Suryanarayana emphasizes that true dharma lies in justice, humanity, and ethical reasoning rather than blind faith or rigid customs. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband

programme.title: Eliot Kid

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Fury Spinner
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Tyohaar Ki Thaali
programme.desc: Sakshi Tanwar in Tyohaar Ki Thaali decides to celebrate one festival a week and along with the celebration, she also prepares two dishes from her mom's diary which is her prized possession. Along with preparing the dishes she also reminisces into the moments of how she celebrated some festivals and also shares some stories about the Gods.

programme.title: The Great Escapes
programme.desc: Dive into a world of action, drama, determination and courage while reliving the greatest escape stories of our time in an all new mini-series ‘The Great Escape'.The show is based on true events and takes you on a thrilling ride of the most daring escapes from Indian history. Some of the stories covered in the series include Sushmita Banerjee's escape from the Taliban in Afghanistan, Dalai Lama's escape from Tibet, the story of a daring jailbreak by the inmates of a jail in Punjab, and Indian prisoner-of-war Nihal Singh and Ram Chander Yadav's escape from the clutches of the Chinese in the Indo-China war. The mini-series even has some comments from the people who made these exhilarating escapes, including the Dalai Lama himself. Each episode takes you to different locations across varied time periods. The stylizations of those eras, mixed with the thrill of escape keeps you hooked till the end.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Tyohaar Ki Thaali
programme.desc: Sakshi Tanwar in Tyohaar Ki Thaali decides to celebrate one festival a week and along with the celebration, she also prepares two dishes from her mom's diary which is her prized possession. Along with preparing the dishes she also reminisces into the moments of how she celebrated some festivals and also shares some stories about the Gods.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Miracle Venom explores the strange, and often bizarre world of the oceans most venomous animals. Follow Dr. Glen Burns as he handles deadly Sea Snakes with only his bare hands.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: They're not whales at all, but by far the largest fish in the sea. They are not a threat to humans, but their numbers are dramatically shrinking. Like elephants slaughtered for their ivory tusks, whale sharks are relentlessly pursued by poachers.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Time is tight as Janice must cast, create, and fit a test brace in just hours. Meanwhile, a Smooth Fox Terrier's mystery ailment puzzles the team, a post-surgery Goldendoodle's recovery is checked, and after a quick prosthetic tune-up, a three-legged Golden Retriever visits a boy who has a similar condition.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.sub-title: These Paws Are Made For Walking
programme.desc: Janice has her hands full fitting a Westie for a knee brace and helping international rescues from Texas and Russia. After being hit by a truck, an Australian Shepherd comes to PawsAbility at a crossroads: can he learn to walk with a brace on all fours again, or will an amputation be in his future?

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Janice casts a pug for a neck brace and a cat for an orthotic boot, and an elderly Shih Tzu hopes to find a simple solution for a possible neurological problem. Meanwhile, a Chocolate Lab looks to take his post-op healing to the next level with a custom brace.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: PawsAbility goes international as three-legged rescues from Mexico and Russia receive new prosthetic legs. Janice also tries to restore a heavily patched orthotic and find an alternative treatment for an elderly German Shepherd unable to undergo surgery.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Things get lively when a dog and a goat roll into PawsAbility in their front-legged carts. Meanwhile, an elderly Labradoodle tries a knee brace to stay active, and a pampered German Shepherd-Mastiff needs an indoor slipper.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Big changes are in store for PawsAbility as Janice moves her practice north of Toronto. An old friend brings some new visitors for brace fittings, while a former Olympic Sledge Hockey champion and his miniature dachshund get some much needed cart adjustments.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Janice is being kept busy with a rare case of a dog who uses prosthetics on both front legs. A schnoodle with a ton of allergies and a rescued greyhound also seek help for some recent injuries, while a cart-using Pyrenees mix proves to be one stubborn pup.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: The Thanos Thumper
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr. converts his K10 truck to an all-electric he test-drives two electric cars, including the world's fastest-accelerating production car.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Mid Engine Madness
programme.desc: Chad's final build of the season is the centerpiece of his client's elegant New Year's Eve celebration the hard deadline and Chad's decision to put the engine in the back has the team scrambling.

programme.title: Spoolin' Up With the DeBertis: Mini Bike Mania
programme.desc: Madera is a master builder of minibikes, and brings in enough bikes to stage a race for shop glory Brad has a vision for a hilarious social media video and hits the streets of Pismo with the crew and their 1961 van.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: New interior and suspension for the '83 El Camino repairing the clutch and drive shaft on the 1995 BMW.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Lou wants to do a head and cam swap on an LS1 engine, so Jared brings in a 1981 DeLorean they see how angry they can make this car.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared gets the chance to build his dream project, but learns that time is not on his side.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has 12 weeks until his baby boy is due, and the same amount of time to fulfill a childhood fantasy, to own a 1950s Alfa 158 but since he doesn't have $20 million lying around, he's going to build it.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has found a donor 1950s chassis, so his ambitious Alfa 158 build can now begin digging deep into his passion for the early years of Formula One racing.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The girls bring an old '65 Chevy C10 nicknamed Old Red and put on some new parts the big job is installing a new all-electronic 4L60 E Transmission.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The owner of a Malibu Wagon is not shy about driving his car fast, he just needs some help with the steering setup before his next race day the girls get rid of the outdated steering and put in an upgraded steering box and new steering accessories.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: The Thanos Thumper
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr. converts his K10 truck to an all-electric he test-drives two electric cars, including the world's fastest-accelerating production car.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. And yet, while it's widely known that, for example, a dog's sense of smell is dozens of times more acute than humans', or that goats have close on a 360 degree field of vision, there's a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation. Call it extra-sensory perception – animal abilities we can't entirely explain but which leave us wondering - and in awe.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: It has been believed that shark attacks are a result of mistaken identity sharks mistake humans for other fish. But can sharks really not tell the difference?

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From skunks to sea cucumbers, nature is full of creatures that deploy foul smells or sticky substances to escape danger. These tactics often turn predators away instantly.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. And yet, while it's widely known that, for example, a dog's sense of smell is dozens of times more acute than humans', or that goats have close on a 360 degree field of vision, there's a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation. Call it extra-sensory perception – animal abilities we can't entirely explain but which leave us wondering - and in awe.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: It has been believed that shark attacks are a result of mistaken identity sharks mistake humans for other fish. But can sharks really not tell the difference?

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Caught! Dangerous, Blue, & Bloated!
programme.desc: Coyote pulls up a strange, bloated blue creature from the water. Is it dangerous or just misunderstood? The team investigates.Coyote faces the GIANT silk caterpillar, whose spiny body delivers a nasty sting. Pain, science, and stunning slow-motion footage await.

programme.title: Stung by the Longest Stinger! (Cow Killer Ant)
programme.desc: The cow killer ant lives up to its name with a stinger that's long, venomous, and brutal. Mark takes it on in a painful sting challenge.The desert scorpion's sting may be quick, but the pain lingers. Mark walks viewers through the anatomy and danger of this desert dweller.

programme.title: Human Blood vs. Snake Venom!
programme.desc: Coyote tests what happens when human blood encounters snake venom in a controlled, educational experiment. He breaks down the biology, effects, and fascinating science behind venom.

programme.title: Stung by a Big Blue Bee!
programme.desc: A massive, electric-blue bee with a sting to match! Mark tests its painful jab while exploring its striking coloration and behavior.Meet the assassin bug: nature's silent killer. Mark gets bitten and shows how this bug dispatches prey with surgical precision.

programme.title: Scariest Pig on the Planet! (Bearded Pig of Borneo)
programme.desc: In Borneo, Mark encounters the bearded pig, a wild and intimidating animal with a face only a mother could love—plus tusks to match.Mark tracks down and is stung by a mammoth wasp—a rare species with a sting that ranks high on the pain scale.

programme.title: Black vs. Green: Milking Deadly Mambas! (Final Snake Milking)
programme.desc: It's a venom showdown—black mamba vs green mamba. Coyote helps milk these snakes and explores which is more dangerous and why.

programme.title: Stung by a Giant Tarantula Hawk!
programme.desc: A Brave Wilderness classic! Mark faces the terrifying sting of the tarantula hawk, one of the most painful insect stings in the world.Scorpion City is no place for the timid. Coyote explores this sting-heavy town and faces its most venomous inhabitants up close.

programme.title: Giant Crocodile Found – Could You Outswim Him?
programme.desc: A massive crocodile emerges—can a human really outrun it? Coyote pits human reflexes against one of nature's top aquatic predators.A venomous brown snake hiding in a toilet? Coyote investigates this bizarre real-life scenario and what it means for homeowners in snake territory.

programme.title: I've Taught You Everything. It's Time.
programme.desc: The swamp is calling — and this time it's war! Coyote faces off against fellow wildlife expert and YouTuber Ray Tiller for a wild snapping turtle showdown you won't want to miss.

programme.title: Stung by a Fireworm!
programme.desc: The fireworm burns without flame. Mark handles this stinging marine creature and ends up with a fiery rash to prove it.Ever wondered what a thousand mosquito bites look like? Coyote offers his arms as bait and explores how mosquitoes affect humans and ecosystems.

programme.title: Gar Wars! The Battle to Save This Giant Fish!
programme.desc: Coyote battles to save the massive alligator gar, a prehistoric fish threatened by habitat loss. This one's a fight for conservation.

programme.title: Electric Eel Shocks Me Again... and Again!
programme.desc: Mark returns to the electric eel—and gets shocked again and again. This episode highlights electricity in nature and its incredible uses.500 fire ants. One arm. Coyote takes a sting challenge that pushes the limits of pain while explaining how fire ants swarm and attack.

programme.title: Mantis Shrimp Punch Test!
programme.desc: The mantis shrimp packs the fastest punch in nature. Coyote shows how its explosive strike can shatter shells—and maybe more.Maggots vs feet? Coyote steps into 300,000 larvae to demonstrate their bizarre biological purpose and what happens when they swarm.

programme.title: Sliced by a Spiny Lobster!
programme.desc: The spiny lobster's claws may look small, but one swipe slices skin. Coyote takes a cut and explains this crustacean's anatomy.Tarpon are giant, fast, and aggressive. Coyote gets up close—and briefly inside—during this wild feeding encounter in the water.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8_en
programme.sub-title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8
programme.desc: Light technology is steadily creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization raises the customer experience to a whole new level.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation_en
programme.sub-title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.sub-title: Budapest Inner-City Mother Church of the Blessed Virgin, Hungary
programme.desc: Budapest, Hungary's capital, is one of the largest and most populous cities in Europe. Budapest's modern city unites Buda, Obuda, and Pest's, three ancient settlements connected in 1873.

programme.title: Cartagena de Indias, Colombia

programme.title: Emergency
programme.sub-title: New Year In The Emergency Room

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Since 1991, Mumbai's population has doubled, with over half living in slums. Buenos Aires faces similar struggles, where 7.6% reside in shantytowns. Paramedics often can't reach these areas and must rely on local volunteers.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Thailand's roads are among the deadliest in the world, with 24,000 deaths in 2016—73% of them motorcyclists. In Bangkok, paramedics remain constantly vigilant. Meanwhile, in Benin, daily fatal accidents keep Cotonou's firefighters busy with medical evacuations.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Massive crowds gather at Allahabad's Maha Kumbh Mela and Manila's Black Nazarene, creating major healthcare challenges. Thousands of medical personnel and volunteers are deployed to keep people safe.

programme.title: Emergency

programme.title: Pure Design

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick cook for some descendants of the Reverend McGregor, the Ulster-Scot who led five ships to New Hampshire in 1714. In the same graveyard where Rev McGregor is buried, Paul discovers a gravestone with his own father's name on it, and wonders if there could be a connection.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick are in Washington D.C. - the capital city and political stronghold of the United States. They are cooking for former White House Press Secretary and Ulster-Scot - Mike McCurry and his friends and family.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”
